_notice: Seed registry for AttributionAgent (offline_seed mode). Curated from this repository's own documents (docs/demo-case-study.md, docs/ecfs-setup.md, docs/repository-polish-audit.md) and from publicly reported coverage of FCC docket 17-108. Each entry is a CANDIDATE source, not a proven origin. AttributionAgent emits evidence packets, not accusations — see ADR-0015.

_schema.entity_name: Human-readable name of the candidate entity.
_schema.entity_type: One of: trade_association | advocacy_group | company | unknown | other.
_schema.url: Public URL we associate with the entity (informational only).
_schema.template_phrases: Distinctive phrases the entity is known to have circulated; matched against cluster representative text.
_schema.notes: Free-form context for reviewers. Not used by the matcher.

template_phrases: The unprecedented regulatory power the Obama Administration imposed on the internet is smothering innovation, damaging the American economy and obstructing job creation.
unprecedented regulatory power the Obama Administration imposed on the internet
smothering innovation, damaging the American economy
damage the American economy, obstruct job creation
sources.notes: Coalition associated with major telecom trade groups (NCTA, CTIA, USTelecom). Phrase variants drawn directly from docs/demo-case-study.md and docs/ecfs-setup.md. Use as a CANDIDATE origin only.
